label: Q3 Future of online shopping (highlighted ending)
highlight_phrases: even more popular in the future
question: Interesting. Next, I’d like to get your opinion. In recent years, online shopping has become more common. Do you think it will become even more popular in the future? Why or why not?

statement_reason.full: Yes, I think online shopping will become even more popular in the future because it helps people shop more efficiently.

before_example.full: For example, in the past, people had to go to physical stores to buy things. They had to drive to the mall, and they had to spend a lot of time looking for what they wanted. So shopping was not very efficient.

after_example.full: But now, people can shop online. They can search for products easily, and they can place orders very quickly. As a result, shopping has become much more efficient, and I believe this trend will continue and online shopping will become even more popular in the future.
